verses.text: 'Blessed is the man that feareth the LORD,' delighting in His commandments; his seed shall be blessed and his house enriched. Godliness brings blessing. The fear of God lays a foundation of lasting good for a man and his family.

'Blessed is the man that feareth the LORD,' delighting in His commandments; his seed shall be blessed and his house enriched. Godliness brings blessing. The fear of God lays a foundation of lasting good for a man and his family.

'Blessed is the man that feareth the LORD,' delighting in His commandments; his seed shall be blessed and his house enriched. Godliness brings blessing. The fear of God lays a foundation of lasting good for a man and his family.

Light rises in his darkness, for he is gracious, merciful, and just, lending freely and guiding his affairs with discretion; he shall not be moved. Mercy marks the godly. The man right with God is generous, fair, and unshaken.

Light rises in his darkness, for he is gracious, merciful, and just, lending freely and guiding his affairs with discretion; he shall not be moved. Mercy marks the godly. The man right with God is generous, fair, and unshaken.

Light rises in his darkness, for he is gracious, merciful, and just, lending freely and guiding his affairs with discretion; he shall not be moved. Mercy marks the godly. The man right with God is generous, fair, and unshaken.
'He shall not be afraid of evil tidings: his heart is fixed, trusting in the LORD.' Settled faith calms fear. The one whose heart rests on God can face bad news without panic.
'He shall not be afraid of evil tidings: his heart is fixed, trusting in the LORD.' Settled faith calms fear. The one whose heart rests on God can face bad news without panic.

He has given freely to the poor, and his righteousness endures; the wicked sees it, gnashes his teeth, and melts away. Generosity is honoured. The open hand of the godly outlasts the envy of the wicked.
